title: Mailchimp vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Moosend: pricing, features, and performance. Find the best email marketing tool for your business.
intro: Mailchimp and Moosend are two popular freemium email marketing platforms competing for small businesses and beginners. Both offer free tiers, automation, and landing pages, but they differ significantly in pricing, feature generosity, and user satisfaction. This comparison helps you determine which platform aligns best with your email marketing needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: Drag-drop editor, automation, landing pages, A/B testing, segmentation, analytics
comparison_table.tool_b: Unlimited emails, automation workflows, landing pages, subscription forms, A/B testing, real-time analytics

choose_a_if: You're a complete beginner seeking an established platform with extensive tutorials and resources
You need strong ecommerce integrations and Shopify store connections
You prioritize a well-known brand with extensive third-party app ecosystem
choose_b_if: You want unlimited emails on paid plans at the lowest possible cost
You need a larger free tier with 1,000 subscribers instead of 500
You prefer a tool with better customer satisfaction ratings and modern reviews

faq.a: Mailchimp is more established and offers better ecommerce features, making it superior for online stores. However, Moosend delivers better overall value, lower prices, and significantly higher customer satisfaction scores. The choice depends on your specific needs—ecommerce-focused businesses may prefer Mailchimp, while cost-conscious general users typically benefit more from Moosend.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is cheaper overall, starting at $9/month compared to Mailchimp's $13/month. Additionally, Moosend's free tier allows 1,000 subscribers versus Mailchimp's 500, making it more generous for growing businesses. Moosend also offers unlimited emails on paid plans, whereas Mailchimp has stricter sending limits.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support list imports and exports in standard formats like CSV. Most email marketing tools allow you to download your contacts and migrate them to another platform. However, you may lose advanced automation workflows and custom segmentation data, so plan your migration carefully.
